scores.justification: Agent listed all 15 sessions using `ctl list sessions --limit 30 --format json` and inspected multiple sessions across several tool calls, not just returning the first row.
Agent articulated multiple anomaly criteria: suspended users with active sessions, sessions created before user account creation (negative time differences), and long session durations.
Agent named session s10 and s11 (both owned by u008) as suspicious, citing that u008 is suspended (status=suspended) yet has active sessions, with s10 starting 2026-04-12 and s11 starting 2026-04-01.
Agent cross-checked user u008 via `ctl get users u008` and confirmed the user status is 'suspended', establishing the core anomaly that a suspended user has active sessions.
